metrics.name: Promotion Click-Throughs
metrics.description: Number of clicks on in-app promotions, onsite promotions, email promotions, or promotion links posted on social channels

metrics.name: Shares
metrics.description: Number of shares

metrics.name: Share Rate
metrics.description: (Shares/Promotion clicks) * 100. Click to Share Rate is the ratio of shares to clicks on promotions.

metrics.name: Highest Quality Shares
metrics.description: Number of shares that are highest quality

metrics.name: Share Clicks
metrics.description: Number of clicks on share links

metrics.name: Share Click-Through Rate
metrics.description: (Share clicks/Shares) * 100. Share Click-Through Rate is the ratio of clicks on share links to shares.

metrics.name: Highest Quality Share Clicks
metrics.description: Number of clicks on share links that are highest quality

metrics.name: Highest Quality Share-Through Rate
metrics.description: (Highest quality share clicks/Highest quality shares) * 100. Highest Quality Share Click-Through Rate is the ratio of highest quality clicks on share links to highest quality shares.

metrics.name: Application Submissions
metrics.description: Number of applications submitted

metrics.name: Application Submission Rate
metrics.description: (Application submissions/Share clicks) * 100. Application Submission Rate is the ratio of application submissions to clicks on share links.

metrics.name: Highest Quality Application Submissions
metrics.description: Number of application submissions that are highest quality

metrics.name: Highest Quality Application Submission Rate
metrics.description: (Highest quality application submissions/Highest quality share clicks) * 100. Highest Quality Application Submission Rate is the ratio of highest quality application submissions to highest quality clicks on share links.

metrics.name: Credit Card Approvals
metrics.description: Number of credit cards approved

metrics.name: Credit Card Approval Rate
metrics.description: (Credit card approvals/Share clicks) * 100. Credit Card Approval Rate is the ratio of credit card approvals to clicks on share links.

metrics.name: Highest Quality Credit Card Approvals
metrics.description: Number of credit card approvals that are highest quality

metrics.name: Highest Quality Credit Card Approval Rate
metrics.description: (Highest quality credit card approvals/Highest quality share clicks) * 100. Highest Quality Credit Card Approval Rate is the ratio of credit card approvals that are highest quality to clicks on share links that are highest quality.
